'''yobazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulg|vulg]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulg|vulg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yobazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yobazhithi|yobazhithi]] || [[word:yobazhiji|yobazhiji]] || [[word:yobazhishi|yobazhishi]] || [[word:yobazhiki|yobazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yobazhuthuthu|yobazhuthuthu]] || [[word:yobazhujuju|yobazhujuju]] || [[word:yobazhushushu|yobazhushushu]] || [[word:yobazhukuku|yobazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yobazhuthu|yobazhuthu]] || [[word:yobazhuju|yobazhuju]] || [[word:yobazhushu|yobazhushu]] || [[word:yobazhuku|yobazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yobazhufthuf|yobazhufthuf]] || [[word:yobazhufjuf|yobazhufjuf]] || [[word:yobazhufshuf|yobazhufshuf]] || [[word:yobazhufkuf|yobazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yobazhethe|yobazhethe]] || [[word:yobazheje|yobazheje]] || [[word:yobazheshe|yobazheshe]] || [[word:yobazheke|yobazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yobazhothotho|yobazhothotho]] || [[word:yobazhojojo|yobazhojojo]] || [[word:yobazhoshosho|yobazhoshosho]] || [[word:yobazhokoko|yobazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yobazhotho|yobazhotho]] || [[word:yobazhojo|yobazhojo]] || [[word:yobazhosho|yobazhosho]] || [[word:yobazhoko|yobazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yobazhofthof|yobazhofthof]] || [[word:yobazhofjof|yobazhofjof]] || [[word:yobazhofshof|yobazhofshof]] || [[word:yobazhofkof|yobazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfthĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfjĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfshĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfkĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfthĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfjĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfshĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfkĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfthĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfjĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfshĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yobazhĂŻfkĂŻf|yobazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yobazhĂŠthĂŠ|yobazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yobazhĂŠjĂŠ|yobazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yobazhĂŠshĂŠ|yobazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yobazhĂŠkĂŠ|yobazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yobazhathatha|yobazhathatha]] || [[word:yobazhajaja|yobazhajaja]] || [[word:yobazhashasha|yobazhashasha]] || [[word:yobazhakaka|yobazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yobazhatha|yobazhatha]] || [[word:yobazhaja|yobazhaja]] || [[word:yobazhasha|yobazhasha]] || [[word:yobazhaka|yobazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yobazhafthaf|yobazhafthaf]] || [[word:yobazhafjaf|yobazhafjaf]] || [[word:yobazhafshaf|yobazhafshaf]] || [[word:yobazhafkaf|yobazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yobazhasha|yobazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yobazhshĂ«sha|yobazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yobazhrosha|yobazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yobazhmusha|yobazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yobazhyasha|yobazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyobazhnkshĂ«sha|goyobazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyobazhnkrosha|goyobazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyobazhnkmusha|goyobazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyobazhnkyasha|goyobazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yobabazhasha|yobabazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yobabazhshĂ«sha|yobabazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yobabazhrosha|yobabazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yobabazhmusha|yobabazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yobabazhyasha|yobabazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyobabazhnkshĂ«sha|goyobabazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyobabazhnkrosha|goyobabazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyobabazhnkmusha|goyobabazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyobabazhnkyasha|goyobabazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yebĂŠzhasha|yebĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yebĂŠzhshĂ«sha|yebĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yebĂŠzhrosha|yebĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yebĂŠzhmusha|yebĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yebĂŠzhyasha|yebĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyebĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|goyebĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyebĂŠzhnkrosha|goyebĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyebĂŠzhnkmusha|goyebĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyebĂŠzhnkyasha|goyebĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yobfazhasha|yobfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yobfazhshĂ«sha|yobfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yobfazhrosha|yobfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yobfazhmusha|yobfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yobfazhyasha|yobfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyobfazhnkshĂ«sha|goyobfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyobfazhnkrosha|goyobfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyobfazhnkmusha|goyobfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyobfazhnkyasha|goyobfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
